nodes.name: Afraid of not being liked or accepted
Bù bèi ài de rén kàn dǒng
Bù tíng de xiàng xià zhuìluò
Bù zài kěqiú bèi rén wéirào
Hàipà bù  bèi xǐhuān  bù bèi jiēshòu
I don't understand where I went wrong
I will be heartbroken before I wake up from the dream
Miàn duì shēngmìng měi gè gǎibiàn
Mèng xǐng zhīqián huì xīn shāng
No longer afraid of broken trust
No longer filling in all the blanks.
No longer longing to be surrounded by people
No longer needing too many smiles
No longer sad about all the departures.
People who are not loved understand
The one who can save me is you
There are some things I don't know how to say, ah
There is no ground at all
Vain hope falls into the black hole of the heart
We are falling through the air
Wéiyī bù biàn shì shàn biàn
Wúshù shīwàng wú kě jì wàng
Xīwàng luòkōng diào jìn xīnlǐ de hēidòng
Yīnwèi wǒ hàipà,  zhēn de hàipà
Yǒuxiē huà bùzhī gāi zěnme shuō, ya
built a wall since I was a kid.
bù míngbái wǒ cuò zài nǎlǐ
bù zài hàipà fāxiàn wǒ yě zài zhè
bù zài hàipà xìnrèn huài diào
bù zài kěqiú wǒ de yǒngbào
bù zài xūyào tài duō wéixiào
bù zài xūyào wǒ de rènkě
bù zài zhǐzé bù zài zhǐzé
bù zài zhǐzé wú guǒ de ài
no longer afraid to discover that I'm here too.
no longer longing for your hugs
néng jiù wǒ de shì nǐ
to be able to land safely
with a clear head/peace of mind, think
不再填补 所有空白
不再害怕 信任坏掉
不再害怕 发现我也在这
不再指责 不再指责
不再指责 无果的爱
不再渴求 我的拥抱
不再渴求 被人围绕
不再难过 所有离开
不再需要 太多微笑
不再需要 我的认可
因为我害怕  真的害怕
害怕不被喜欢  不被接受
希望落空 掉进心里的黑洞
无数失望 无可寄望
有些话不知该怎么说呀
没有东西 可以抓住
